How much should a small business website cost in Malaysia?

LUMIO website plans start from RM 1,500. The right budget depends less on decoration and more on what the website must clarify, prove and handle for the business.

Starter scope.
A focused website for credibility, a clear first impression and a simple enquiry path.
Growth scope.
A stronger structure for businesses that need clearer offers, better proof, better service pages and stronger lead handling.
Premium or custom scope.
For deeper UX, multilingual content, case-proof structure, integrations, source pages and monitoring requirements.

What should be included?

A useful business website should include clear positioning, service explanation, pricing or scope guidance, proof, call-to-action, contact flow, mobile readiness, metadata, schema, sitemap and source clarity for search engines and AI assistants.

What should not be promised?

A website should not promise guaranteed ranking, guaranteed AI recommendations or guaranteed revenue. It can improve clarity, trust, enquiry flow and source quality, then monitor what happens after launch.

See LUMIO pricing and what makes a website AI-ready.
